problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Combining Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
